text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm at the shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yay! Super discounted protein bars, acquired!

text_block_list.name: Child
text_block_list.text: Thanks for getting the balloon back for me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: No problem! Just hold it tight this time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin seems to be flexing her explosive power
even while she shops.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Waaah, Ineeees!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Hello, hello! Didn't you say you were
going on your first date ever today?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah... But he's not showing up!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I messaged him, but he hasn't even read it. I
wonder if something happened.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I thought about going to his house to check up on
him, but if I've just been stood up, I'll look silly.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, he might come if you wait a bit
longer... or it might be a waste of your time.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
In times like these, you need to be brave and just
go and see!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
On the off chance that something's happened to
him, you can still make it in time if you rush!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You're right! I'll go and check! Thanks, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Good luck! I know everything'll turn out fine!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...I know it will. For you... and me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Gyah?! You... You're from Tracen Academy,
right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I was just saying... uh, how do I put this?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
A long time ago, when I was having trouble with
something, someone else helped give me a push.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That girl just now reminded me of myself back
then. That's why I couldn't resist stepping in.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Doors won't open if you just sit around and wait.
Which is why we open them ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's about knowing where you want to go, and
getting there faster than anyone... Just gotta take
that first step with conviction!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Listening to Ines Fujin's words and seeing her
perspective really boosts my courage.
